sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85206" key="polu/plektos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολύ-πλεκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n85206.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πολύπλοκος</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:5:247" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.247</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σειραί</foreign> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2045.tlg001.perseus-grc1:26:106" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26.106</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
